_comment: Intelligent Noise's product features, encoded as routing profiles. Ryan provided this taxonomy on 2026-06-16. Each feature maps to a task bucket + intelligence/cost/frequency dimensions in Ryan's vocabulary. Hand-curated first-pass mapping — review when features evolve.

_intelligence_to_min_percentile._doc: Maps Ryan's qualitative intelligence-required labels to a minimum percentile-rank within the dataset for the matching task. 'Low' = no filter; 'Very High' = top 15%.

_cost_sensitivity_to_tiers._doc: Maps Ryan's cost-sensitivity labels to which pricing tiers should be ENABLED. Higher cost sensitivity restricts to cheaper tiers.

features.name: Inny Main Agent / Chat Orchestration
features.description: Rep-facing chat that interprets requests, plans work, selects capabilities, asks follow-up questions, and synthesizes responses.
features.notes: Front door to the platform — leads to CRM/tool actions, reasoning quality matters.

features.name: Tool Planning & Governed Actions
features.description: Determines when a request requires tools, approvals, or structured proposals before execution.
features.notes: Incorrect routing creates downstream issues. Closest task bucket = web_research (agentic) since it's tool-use planning.

features.name: CRM / Account Q&A
features.description: Natural language answers over CRM, account, company, contact, and deal data.
features.notes: Candidate for model tiering based on complexity.

features.name: Run / Status Investigation
features.description: Explains background runs, failures, artifacts, and operational state.
features.notes: Good lower-cost candidate if context is already structured.

features.name: Specialized Subagents
features.description: Delegated agents used for scoped research and analysis tasks.
features.notes: Cost depends on task type and context size.

features.name: WARM Path Full Research
features.description: Deep account and network research, source gathering, evidence classification, path finding, no-path preservation, and final synthesis.
features.notes: Premium-model territory — complexity + business impact.

features.name: WARM Pre-Approval Classifier
features.description: Lightweight classification before launching full WARM research.
features.notes: Strong candidate for low-cost structured models.

features.name: ICP Account Discovery
features.description: Agentic account discovery and research workflow.
features.notes: Potential split between cheaper extraction and more expensive synthesis.

features.name: Follow-Up Semantic Gates
features.description: Determines whether follow-up should happen and whether available context is sufficient/useful.
features.notes: Strong candidate for cheaper structured-output models.

features.name: Follow-Up Draft Generation
features.description: Generates rep-ready follow-up messaging.
features.notes: Mid-tier models sufficient except for strategic accounts.

features.name: Public Source Extraction
features.description: Extracts structured signal facts from public content.
features.notes: Structured extraction should be benchmarked aggressively.

features.name: Source Relevance Routing
features.description: Determines whether a source is relevant to a signal or account.
features.notes: One of the strongest low-cost candidates in the entire portfolio.

features.name: Source Identity Resolution
features.description: Determines whether a source/entity matches the intended company or person.
features.notes: False positives are expensive — favor models with higher precision.

features.name: Contact Slate Ranking
features.description: Ranks likely contacts/personas to engage based on a signal.
features.notes: Precision AND recall matter.

features.name: Draft-or-Skip Generation
features.description: Decides whether outreach should be generated and drafts messaging when appropriate.
features.notes: Skip/no-skip accuracy more important than generation cost.

features.name: Lead Research
features.description: Researches inbound leads and target accounts.
features.notes: Important optimization area due to volume.

features.name: Lead Research Extraction
features.description: Converts research into structured lead/account facts.
features.notes: Strong lower-cost model candidate.

features.name: Lead Qualification
features.description: Performs qualification judgments and scoring.
features.notes: False qualification/disqualification impacts revenue.

features.name: Lead Email Generation
features.description: Generates outbound and inbound messaging.
features.notes: Mid-tier models likely sufficient for most cases.

features.name: Insight Analysis
features.description: Analyzes marketing and account intelligence and returns structured insights.
features.notes: Cost depends on complexity and whether output is customer-facing.

features.name: Knowledge Base Embeddings
features.description: Embedding model used for retrieval support.
features.notes: Not a reasoning model — track spend separately. EXCLUDED from the recommender.

features.name: Conversation Compaction
features.description: Summarizes long conversations while preserving decisions, constraints, and unresolved items.
features.notes: Good lower-cost candidate if fidelity remains strong.

features.name: Memory Proposal / Memory Synthesis
features.description: Proposes durable memory candidates from historical interactions.
features.notes: Accuracy and privacy matter more than latency/cost.
